evidence.description: The implementation follows the requirement to fetch quotes on selection, compute position-level PnL from latest quotes, and normalize mixed-currency totals to JPY.
The component behavior matches the documented scenarios for ready, pending-rate, missing-input, and quote-error states.
The test plan explicitly covers mixed-currency conversion, pending-rate handling, controlled inputs, native-price rendering, and quote-failure behavior.
The unit tests cover mixed-currency aggregation, USD/JPY absence, and missing-input exclusion from totals.
The pure summary builder correctly classifies ready, missing-input, missing-quote, and pending-rate positions, and aggregates only ready positions.
The panel preserves editable rows, displays native prices, and renders the aggregate summary without crashing on errors.
The module boundaries separate the React Query hook, DOM component, and pure aggregation utility as intended.
The source files align with the declared responsibilities and test coverage requirements.
The hook tests exercise empty input, multi-ticker fetch, and error handling for the quote query layer.
The component tests verify controlled input emission, JPY aggregation, native-price display, and quote-error preservation.
